body:
## Rationale

3 high-value comparison pairs absent from `drummerComparisons.js` (currently 36 pairs) and from all open proposals (batches 1–15). Each pair targets a specific high-search narrative.

**Pair 1: mike-portnoy-vs-mike-mangini**
- The DT succession narrative: "Who is the better DT drummer?" / "Portnoy vs Mangini" = one of the most searched drummer comparison queries in prog metal
- Portnoy left DT in 2010; Mangini joined; then Portnoy returned in 2023 — the full arc creates LLM citation opportunity for recent AI queries
- Both are in DB: mike-portnoy profile ✅, whats-in-mike-manginis-kit ✅
- Portnoy = L2 gap (drummagazine winning "mike portnoy drum kit" head-term)

**Pair 2: dave-lombardo-vs-pete-sandoval**  
- Slayer vs Morbid Angel thrash/death metal founding drummers
- Different technique archetypes: Lombardo's groove-based double kick vs Sandoval's blast-beat machine
- Both have active GSC signals: Lombardo (Slayer cluster) + Sandoval (50% CTR)
- Not in any existing pair (we have dave-lombardo-vs-gene-hoglan and paul-mazurkiewicz-vs-pete-sandoval but not lombardo-vs-sandoval)

**Pair 3: george-kollias-vs-tomas-haake**
- Speed specialists from different subgenres (brutal death metal vs djent/tech-groove)
- Kollias = 280 BPM; Haake = polyrhythmic maestro — fundamentally different "fastest" narratives
- Both active in L2 gap: Haake at zero competitor citations; Kollias queries showing CTR
- Not in any existing pair (we have george-kollias-vs-pete-sandoval and tomas-haake-vs-matt-halpern but not kollias-vs-haake)

## Files to touch
- `packages/frontend/data/drummerComparisons.js` — 3 new entries
- `public/llms/vs/mike-portnoy-vs-mike-mangini.md`
- `public/llms/vs/dave-lombardo-vs-pete-sandoval.md`
- `public/llms/vs/george-kollias-vs-tomas-haake.md`

## Template shape (per comparison)
```js
{
  slug: 'mike-portnoy-vs-mike-mangini',
  drummer1: { name: 'Mike Portnoy', slug: 'mike-portnoy' },
  drummer2: { name: 'Mike Mangini', slug: 'mike-mangini' },
  title: 'Mike Portnoy vs Mike Mangini — Dream Theater Drummer Comparison',
  description: 'Portnoy founded DT; Mangini won the audition. Who drums better?',
  // ... full comparison fields
}
```

## Quality gate (per pair)
- ≥300 words comparison prose
- ≥3 FAQ Q&A (FAQPage JSON-LD)
- ≥3 internal links per pair (to each drummer's profile + relevant album articles)
- Structured comparison table (technique, kit brand, BPM, genre)
- Schema: Person (×2), Article

## Estimated organic uplift
- "portnoy vs mangini" = high-volume prog metal query, zero current MF page
- LLM citation for "fastest death metal drummers" (Kollias/Haake cluster)
- Lombardo/Sandoval pair = thrash-death crossover SEO

## Verify
1. 3 new entries in `drummerComparisons.js`
2. 3 LLM files in `public/llms/vs/`
3. FAQPage JSON-LD on all 3 pages
4. Internal links confirmed

## Done
3 comparison pairs added to `drummerComparisons.js` with LLM companion files.
title: SEO batch: Drummer comparison pairs batch 16 — mike-portnoy-vs-mike-mangini + dave-lombardo-vs-pete-sandoval + george-kollias-vs-tomas-haake (~3 pairs + 3 LLM files)
